nasb.text: and will come forth; those who did the good deeds to a resurrection of life, those who committed the evil deeds to a resurrection of judgment.

esv.text: and come out, those who have done good to the resurrection of life, and those who have done evil to the resurrection of judgment.

cnv.text: 並且都要出來；行善的復活得生命，作惡的復活被定罪。

ccb.text: 他们都要从坟墓里出来。行善的人复活后得永生，作恶的人复活后被定罪。”

csbs.text: 并且要出来——行善的人复活得生命，作恶的人复活被定罪。
